image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about antiviral vs antibiotic.
Context visual: Many confuse them, but they serve different purposes. Antivirals target viruses, while antibiotics fight bacteria. Simpl
Escalation visual: Imagine battling the flu with antibiotics! It won’t work. But why? Because they’re designed for entirely different enemi
Evidence visual: Research indicates that using antibiotics against viruses can lead to resistance, making bacterial infections harder to
Payoff visual: So next time you’re sick, remember: choose the right treatment. Ask your doctor for the best advice.
